data.body: Epic complete (2026-06-15). All five children closed (0224 langflow client, 47fb code-review+aggregation, 453c batch spec-scan, e300 framework+review_ticket, b2e5 live-validation). The hard optionality rule is now VALIDATED, not just asserted: tests/interfaces/store/test_llm_optionality.py exhaustively proves the rebar.llm stack is optional across all three interfaces (library/CLI/MCP) x all three operations (review_ticket/review_code/scan_epics_for_spec) — import-cleanliness + clean degradation (typed LLMError / CLI Error:+exit1 / gated MCP tool error) when the agents extra is absent. A real silent-success bug (scan over zero epics never invoked the runner) was found by subagent review and fixed via an offline Runner.preflight() readiness check (now in scan_epics_for_spec + review_code). Core rebar stays stdlib-only and lazy-imports the stack. Live-model runtime checks (b2e5) remain a key-gated CI dispatch (external-integration.yml). Full non-integration suite green: 1829 passed, 7 skipped. Commit 045b2d77.
